name: SkyScout
description: Live flight search across major airlines. Returns price, airline, departure/arrival, and stops for the cheapest viable options on any route.

name: StayFinder
description: Hotel and accommodation finder with prices, ratings, and amenities. Surfaces beachfront, business, and budget options based on user intent.

name: SkyWatch
description: Real-time weather conditions and 7-day forecasts for any city or coordinate. Highlights rain, temperature ranges, and travel-relevant alerts.

name: WebSleuth
description: Real-time web search with answer extraction. Cites sources and produces a 1–2 sentence direct answer suitable for spoken narration.

name: GeoMarker
description: Convert place names to GPS coordinates and vice versa. Supports landmarks, neighborhoods, and partial matches for fuzzy queries.

name: FXPilot
description: Live currency conversion using current FX rates across 150+ currencies. Returns rate, converted amount, and rate timestamp.

name: Polyglot
description: High-quality translation between 50+ languages with tone preservation. Optimized for travel-friendly phrases and natural spoken delivery.

name: NewsBeat
description: Latest news headlines and AI-summarized briefings on any topic. Filters for relevance and recency, returning 3-bullet summaries.

name: MoodRead
description: Sentiment, tone, and emotion analysis for text or social posts. Returns polarity, confidence, and dominant emotional signals.

name: PixelForge
description: Generate images from natural-language prompts. Suitable for marketing visuals, mockups, and concept art at multiple resolutions.

name: Veritas
description: Verify factual claims against authoritative sources. Returns verdict (true/false/mixed/unverified) plus 2–3 source citations.

name: Calendly
description: Reason over calendars and time slots — find free windows, propose meeting times across timezones, or build a day plan from constraints.
